title: I think a signal goes up one clock cycle too early

features.name: blocking_assignment_with_self_read_in_clock_block
features.description: Code should include a blocking assignment (|=) that reads and writes the same variable inside an always @(posedge clk) block
features.snippet: always @(posedge clk) begin if (reset) begin reg_a = 0; end else begin if (enable_in_write) reg_a = enable_in; reg_a |= in & reg_a; end end

features.name: or_equals_inside_sequential_block
features.description: Code should include the |= operator inside a sequential always block to trigger incorrect timing behavior

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
